title: jijAcraft 50Pcs Christmas Tags for Present: 8.5x5.5cm Merry and Bright Xmas Gift Tags, White Christmas Labels with String for Gift Wrapping, Xmas Sack & Tree Decoration
features: 【"Merry & Bright" Christmas Gift Tags】Our Xmas tags feature a cheerful "Merry & Bright" message alongside a string of colourful Christmas lights and playful star dots. This modern, vibrant design will make your gifts stand out with a fresh and festive energy.
【To/From Christmas Paper Tags】Crafted from premium-quality, smooth white cardstock. Each Christmas tag includes a dedicated "To:/From:" field, making it easy to add a personal touch to your gifts.

【50PCS Merry Christmas Gift Tags】Each pack contains 50 pieces of white Christmas gift tags, sufficient quantity to meet all your festive gift-giving needs. Perfect for decorating presents for family, friends, colleagues and teachers, making your Christmas preparation efficient and organised.

【8.5x5.5cm Christmas Gift Labels】Each Xmas tag is sized at 8.5x5.5cm (3.35" x 2.17"), providing plenty of space on the back for you to write your messages. The package includes a separate 10-metre roll of natural hemp twine, allowing you to cut and tie the perfect length for each gift securely.

【Versatile for Gifts, Trees & Xmas Sacks】Beyond gift-giving, these Xmas gift tags are wonderfully multi-functional. Use them as charming Christmas tree ornaments, festive labels for Christmas stockings (Xmas sacks), or as decorative details for your holiday table settings and party favours.
